results.rendered_html:
praveṇiḥ -ṇī f.
1 A braid of hair (in general);  R. 15. 30. 
2 The hair twisted and unadorned (worn by wives in the absence of their husbands).
3 The housings of an elephant.
4 A piece of colour
(pb) ed woollen cloth.
5 The current or stream (of a river).
